title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin proposes a workflow that routes different phases of frontend development to Claude Opus and Gemini 3.5 Flash based on their respective strengths: Opus for reasoning and planning, Gemini for visual design and UI generation. He demonstrates this handoff pattern implemented through coding agents Pi and Archon to build full-stack applications.
